Event: The Orc Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 01/10/2023
Sage Bot Item Code: O3


Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Red Dragon
Cave Sorcerer Orb

Once in a while, launches a magic orb at the farthest enemy. On impact, the magic orb scares the enemy for 3 sec. After the effect wears off, the target of the ability and all enemies in a small radius around it are stunned for 2 (+Spell Power bonus) sec and take 130000 (+Spell Power bonus) magic damage.

Requirements: 98-100
